summary: Iteration-3 e2e testing of DharmaSearch after expansion to 16 scriptures (7 new Kerala texts), 5 reading plans, transliterations (Malayalam/Hindi), and temple connections. Backend: 21/21 pytest tests pass (test_dharma_app.py rewritten to assert 16 scriptures with hyphenated text_ids incl. srimad-bhagavatam, narayaneeyam, adhyatma-ramayanam, lalita-sahasranama, vishnu-sahasranama, soundarya-lahari, vivekachudamani; new tests cover plan list, plan detail with verse_details map, plan progress add/idempotent/missing-day, transliterations dict {ml,hi} and temple_connection dict {temple,location,detail} on Narayaneeyam verses, keyword search hits for 'Guruvayur'->narayaneeyam and 'Shankaracharya'->vivekachudamani/soundarya-lahari). AI endpoints still return graceful 503 due to inactive EMERGENT_LLM_KEY (expected per problem statement). Frontend: Landing page lists 16 texts incl. Narayaneeyam, Srimad Bhagavatam, Soundarya Lahari, Vivekachudamani. Login (admin/admin123) -> dashboard. Sidebar has 5 tabs (Daily Verse, Search, Browse, Plans, Saved - visible in screenshot). Browse > 16 scripture cards listed; clicking Narayaneeyam loads 4 chapters; chapter 1 loads verse nar-1-1 with temple_connection card (Guruvayur Sri Krishna Temple, Kerala, with detail about Melpathur composing it in 1586) and Malayalam+Hindi transliteration buttons. Clicking Malayalam button reveals Malayalam script ('സാന്ദ്രാനന്ദാവബോധാത്മകം...'). Plans tab lists all 5 prebuilt plans (gita-7-days, upanishad-intro, kerala-devotion, yoga-path, divine-feminine). Opening Kerala plan shows 7 days; Day 1 ('Guruvayur's Prayer') loads Narayaneeyam verses with temple connections and Malayalam/Hindi buttons. Mark Complete button works and immediately reflects 'Completed' badge. Progress persists - back-to-plan-list shows 7-day card. Keyword search 'Guruvayur' returns 2 Narayaneeyam verses; 'Shankaracharya' returns 2 verses (Soundarya Lahari + Vivekachudamani with Adi Shankaracharya Birthplace and Sringeri Sharada Peetham temple cards). Share-as-Image modal: opens, all 4 themes (Dark/Light/Night/Parchment) selectable, canvas renders, Download Image button present.

minor.issue: Still 503 because EMERGENT_LLM_KEY remains inactive. Backend handles error gracefully (expected per problem statement).

Only called from inside seed_scriptures which early-returns when verses already exist. On a fresh DB with stale verses but no plans the plans would never seed. Currently fine because seed_reading_plans uses upsert and is called within the same block, but recommend moving the call to startup() unconditionally to make it idempotent across deploys.

issues: Subtitle reads 'Find verses by meaning or exact keywords across 9 sacred texts'. Stale copy - should now say 16 sacred texts.

data-testid naming inconsistent: nav-search / nav-browse / nav-plans exist but the Daily Verse and Saved nav items use different testids (or none of the nav-* pattern). Recommend standardising to nav-daily-verse and nav-saved for testability.

action_items: Frontend (cosmetic): Update Search tab subtitle to '16 sacred texts' (currently shows '9 sacred texts').
Frontend (testability): Add data-testid='nav-daily-verse' and 'nav-saved' to sidebar items for consistent automation hooks.
Backend (robustness, optional): Move seed_reading_plans() call to startup() instead of inside seed_scriptures() so plans always upsert on each deploy.
Backend: Reactivate EMERGENT_LLM_KEY to enable AI search/AI explain (only outstanding blocker for AI features).
critical_code_review_comments: server.py >640 lines and growing - consider splitting into routers/auth.py, routers/scriptures.py, routers/plans.py, routers/bookmarks.py.
seed_reading_plans is only invoked from inside seed_scriptures() after the early-return guard; moving it to startup() ensures plans are idempotently seeded even if scripture counts change.
PlanProgress endpoint POST /plans/{plan_id}/progress does not verify the plan_id exists - it will silently create progress for non-existent plans. Add a find_one({plan_id}) check.
Frontend Search subtitle hard-codes '9 sacred texts' - should derive count from scriptures.length to avoid future drift.
VerseCard.handleBookmark now correctly treats 400 'Already' as success-state (iteration-2 finding fixed).

success_rate.backend: 100% (21/21 pytest pass; AI 503 expected due to inactive key)
success_rate.frontend: ~98% (all new features verified: 16 texts, Kerala texts loading, transliterations Malayalam display, temple connection cards, 5 reading plans, Kerala plan 7-day flow, mark complete + progress persistence, Guruvayur/Shankaracharya keyword search, share-as-image 4 themes). Only cosmetic: stale '9 sacred texts' copy on Search tab.)

test_credentials: Admin: admin@example.com / admin123 (verified working). Test user registered dynamically: testuser_<ts>@example.com / testpass123.
seed_data_creation: None - relied on existing seed of 208 verses / 16 scriptures / 5 plans.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Backend tests at /app/backend/tests/test_dharma_app.py now expect exactly 16 scriptures (set EXPECTED_SCRIPTURES) and >=5 plans (set EXPECTED_PLANS). Reading-plan tests assume admin can read plans (admin gets plans list because of $or:[{is_prebuilt:true},{created_by:user_id}] - admin sees prebuilts since they match is_prebuilt). Plan-progress test uses new_user_session to avoid polluting admin progress. Frontend Playwright testids: plan-{plan_id}, plan-day-{N}, plan-day-view, plan-detail-view, plan-back, plan-day-back, mark-complete-btn, plans-section, prebuilt-plans. VerseCard testids: translit-{ml|hi|ta|te|kn}-{verse_id}, translit-text-{verse_id}, temple-{verse_id}. Sidebar: nav-search, nav-browse, nav-plans confirmed; nav-daily-verse and nav-saved NOT present (use text selectors or fix testids). REACT_APP_BACKEND_URL must be exported in env before running pytest - shell doesn't auto-inherit from frontend/.env.
rca_of_the_issue: No new issues. Iteration-2 bookmark-overlay issue is fixed (VerseCard.handleBookmark now branches on err.response.status===400 and silently sets bookmarked=true). AI 503 root cause unchanged: EMERGENT_LLM_KEY inactive -> LiteLLM AuthenticationError -> backend wraps to HTTPException(503, 'AI search is temporarily unavailable...').
